reflections.context: Status-reconciliation sweep over the now-visible uncommittedOpen aims.
reflections.outcome: Verified implemented in code (SessionMemory + loadSessionMemoryContext) and marked done.
reflections.effectiveness: Quick, high-confidence: the feature is present and wired.
reflections.lesson: Cross-session memory was already built and merely unmarked — typical of the stale-status drift the sweep targets.

status.comment: Implemented: SessionMemory (packages/wrapped-agents/common/src/session-memory.ts) persists per-session summaries to .bowman/memory/sessions and loadSessionMemoryContext injects loadRecentSummaries + the system-friction summary into the next session's instruct context. Cross-session memory exists and is wired into the watchdog.
